positive: Minimalist stylized illustration of a crescent moon embracing a sleeping fox, rendered in negative space line art on a deep indigo background. The fox's silhouette is flowing and elegant, with delicate geometric patterns outlining the moon. High contrast, clean black lines against the dark background, suitable for screen printing. Perfect symmetry, central composition, highly decorative, ethereal, cosmic, vaporwave aesthetic. Studio lighting, vibrant and moody color palette, vector graphic style.
